connectDesc: Connect the wallet you used to create this bounty to view solutions.
title: Winning Solutions
desc: These solutions are encrypted with your wallet's public key. Only you can decrypt them — not even the platform can see them.
privacyNote: Solutions were decrypted locally in your browser using your wallet. The platform never had access to the plaintext.
security1: Solutions are encrypted with your public key inside the secure hardware enclave (TEE)
security2: The encrypted blob passes through our servers — we cannot read it
security3: Decryption happens in your browser using your wallet — the solution never leaves your device unencrypted
walletNote: You'll be asked to sign a message to prove you're the sponsor. This costs no gas.
